Sirentide — Entity-relationship diagram

Live renderer output — the SVG below was produced by Sirentide from the DSL beside it.

erDiagram
CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
ORDER ||--|{ LINE-ITEM : contains
CUSTOMER }o--o| ADDRESS : has
CUSTOMER {
string name PK
string email
int age
}
ORDER {
int id PK
date created
}

An entity-relationship diagram. NAME { type field PK } declares an entity table with typed attributes (PK marks a key); A ||--o{ B : verb draws a relationship with crow-foot cardinality at each end — || exactly-one (bar), o{ zero-or-many (circle + foot), |{ one-or-many (bar + foot), o| zero-or-one.

All sixteen types on one page: showcase.html · browser-audited renders: gallery
